title: Fix process reference giving no return statement error

features.name: process self reference in class constructor
features.description: Code should include a class constructor that captures process::self() into a class member variable of type process

features.name: function returning int with process-related static call
features.description: Code should include a function that returns an integer, calls a static class method, and has a return statement, where the static method is related to process handling

features.name: process self call in imported package context
features.description: Code should include a function call to process::self() within a package that is imported into a module, where the function is used in an assign statement
